title: apoballis brevipes
intro: Apoballis brevipes, also known as the "Purple Passion Fruit", is a type of plant that belongs to the family Annonaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
